titles.text: Ore-sama Kingdom: Koi mo Manga mo Debut wo Mezase! Doki-doki Love Lesson
オレ様キングダム 恋もマンガもデビューを目指せ！ ドキドキ Love レッスン

descriptions.text: Ore-sama Kingdom: Koi mo Manga mo Debut o Mezase! Doki Doki Love Lesson is a visual novel for the Nintendo DS.
The story centers on Nonoha Nonohara, a young manga artist who just enrolled in a new school.
